name: Shaoxing Wine
descs:
[Effects apply only to #2 Deployed Identity]

Deal +1% damage for every 1% missing HP on self (max 10%)

[Effects apply only to #2 <style="upgradeHighlight">and #4 Deployed Identities</style>]

Deal +1% damage for every 1% missing HP on self (max 10%)

[Effects apply only to #2 ,#4, <style="upgradeHighlight">and #6</style> Deployed Identities]

Deal +1% damage for every 1% missing HP on self (max 10%)
